question: What is the merchant ecosystem risk — how will self-operated brands coexist with existing marketplace sellers?

findings.claim: PDD announced Xinpinmu on March 25, 2026 with RMB 15B initial capital injection and RMB 100B planned over 3 years for self-operated brand building
findings.data: Two Shanghai entities registered: Shanghai Xinpinmu Hongqiao E-commerce Co. (registered Feb 2, 2026, RMB 10B capital, Changning District) and Shanghai Xinpinmu Pudong E-commerce Co. (registered Feb 3, 2026, RMB 5B capital, Pudong). Total first tranche: RMB 15B. Three-year plan: RMB 100B.

findings.claim: Xinpinmu integrates Pinduoduo + Temu supply chains to build self-operated brands targeting global markets across categories
findings.data: Three core pillars: (1) Dedicated company with RMB 100B over 3 years covering domestic industrial belts, custom manufacturing solutions, cultivating self-operated brands; (2) Dedicated teams embedded in industrial belts providing product/tech/marketing integrated solutions; (3) Comprehensive brand go-global solutions including product standards, warehousing/logistics, IP services, legal aid, regulatory compliance.

findings.claim: This marks PDD's first move from pure platform model to platform + self-operated hybrid, a fundamental business model shift
findings.data: PDD previously operated as a pure marketplace, earning from merchant advertising and transaction commissions. Multiple analysts note this is PDD's first time 'going heavy' with self-operated retail, moving from 'super channel' to 'supply chain leader'. Commentary: 'Previously not doing self-operated was what made PDD the most profitable among the three major e-commerce players.'
